name: Indonesia
intro: Indonesia is digitising at archipelago scale: super-apps, state-owned enterprises modernising, banks racing digital challengers, and a new capital city under construction. That combination has made Jakarta one of Southeast Asia's fastest-growing markets for certified project and agile professionals — international credentials carry particular weight because they translate across the foreign investors and regional headquarters driving much of the hiring. Our live online weekend batch runs on the IST schedule, landing at friendly late-morning to evening hours in Western Indonesia time. Instruction is in English, which doubles as interview practice for the multinational roles most candidates target. Invoices support employer sponsorship. After the two days, we walk through your exam application, run mock exams calibrated to the real difficulty, and stay available for questions until you clear.

faq.q: How much does certification training cost in Indonesia?
faq.a: The course fee is US$1,295 for PMP and US$695 for CSM, covering the full live online weekend workshop, study materials, mock exams and exam application support. PMI's PMP exam fee (US$425 member / US$675 non-member) is paid separately to PMI; the CSM exam is included in the course fee.

faq.q: Are the classes live or recorded?
faq.a: Every batch is taught live by an instructor over two weekend days — not pre-recorded videos. You can ask questions in real time, work through exercises with the cohort, and reach the trainer afterwards for doubts.

faq.q: Is the certification recognised by employers in Indonesia?
faq.a: Yes. PMP (from PMI) and CSM (from Scrum Alliance) are global credentials recognised identically everywhere, including by employers and recruiters across Indonesia.
